title: heterotheca stenophylla
intro: Heterotheca stenophylla, also known as Drummond's false goldeneye, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Heterotheca stenophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system health. Heterotheca stenophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
